curation_notes: Patch commit c43823750bffa5b6abcc086683b15a068513b67b (PR #10893) modifies two source files. The primary fix adds html.escape() to all dataframe cell values in render_table before rendering them as HTML. A secondary fix in FailedStepCard.__init__ restructures the stacktrace template so the failure_traceback is properly escaped via the Jinja2 |e filter rather than being injected via f-string. Pre-assigned xss class confirmed from CWE-79, advisory description, and patch diff.
